title: Vercel not connected (frontend deployment)
closure_reason: Superseded by ADR-004 (M0-T011 accepted 2026-07-16, G3 PASS): the Next.js frontend is served from the Render web service nycdf-web; no Vercel account, token, or integration will be created. Owner decision 2026-07-14.
detail: No Vercel CLI/token configured. Frontend code can be built and CI-tested in GitHub Actions without it; only deployment is blocked.
exact_human_action: Create/confirm a Vercel account at https://vercel.com, create a token at Account Settings -> Tokens, and provide it as VERCEL_TOKEN in the harness secret store. Alternatively connect the GitHub repo martin10101/nyc-buildability to Vercel via the Vercel dashboard Git integration (no token needed in that path).
secret_name: VERCEL_TOKEN (only if CLI/API deployment path is chosen)
where_to_enter: Harness/OS secret store or Vercel dashboard Git integration
minimum_permissions: Token scoped to the single Vercel team/project used for this product
how_it_will_be_tested: vercel whoami (CLI in CI) or GET https://api.vercel.com/v2/user; expected: authenticated identity JSON. Token never echoed.
